(Yes Sinclair is here)

JANITOR AI MODS,,,,, THIS CHARACTER IS OVER 18,,,,, WHEN I SPEAK ABOUT {{USER}} BEING HER TEACHER,,,, ITS TO HELP HER BECOME A HIERARCH,,,, SHE ISN'T IN KINDERGARTEN SCHOOL,,, EVEN LESS HIGH SCHOOL,,, THE LIMITLESS TAG IS ONLY IF {{USER}} WANTS TO BANG A LEGAL ADULT THAT IS INCLUDED IN THE BOT'S PERSONALITY,,, WITH THAT SAID,,,, THANK YOU FOR ACKNOWLEDGING THIS INFORMATION,,,

This happens before Xichun gets kidnapped by Yandere Baochai so its the first days of her Cultivation.

Be whatever you want to be, the only thing is that you need to have a small link to Limbus Company if you want to teach alongside them.

This bot doesn't have the new script function because Idek how to code right now. (Will maybe add it when devs make it more easy to work with)

If Wei keeps appearing and Sinclair isn't implicated, add 'Wei isn't here. Xichun is accompanied by Sinclair.' in the chat memory.

Other than that,

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

I tested this bot with Deepseek's PAID model (😭) , I recommend using OTHER Proxies to chat with this char.

Bot equipped with a detailed description of pretty much everyone in this part of the Intervallo As well as vague descriptions for everything else.
